parsed.production_notes: Live-action footage featuring a human actor, real physical environments, and practical props. No AI generation artifacts are present.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, light brown complexion, short curly dark hair. Wears glasses in later scenes.
characters.wardrobe: Olive green t-shirt, light blue jeans.

characters.appearance: 2D animated older male, dark skin, thick black mustache, dark hair.

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime, white couch, bookshelf.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A falls backward onto a white sectional couch in a bright living room. He holds a smartphone in his hand. A bookshelf and a staircase with black railings are visible in the background.

scenes.visual_description: Character A dramatically falls onto the couch while holding his phone. Subtitles appear on screen.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up of a person's hand holding a black smartphone. The background is slightly out of focus, showing a light-colored carpet and part of a white couch.

scenes.visual_description: A hand holds a smartphone displaying the Duolingo app. The screen shows a green background with the Duolingo owl logo, then transitions to a dark-themed chess puzzle interface with stylized pieces and an animated character.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Duolingo teaches chess. It's all puzzle-based bite-sized strategy that sticks. It's built for beginners and those who pretend to be pros. Coach Oscar helps everyone the same.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Duolingo teaches chess.
It's all puzzle-based bite-sized strategy that sticks.
It's built for beginners and those who pretend to be pros.
Coach Oscar helps everyone the same.

scenes.setting: Kitchen, daytime, white cabinets, island counter.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands in a modern kitchen, leaning on a white countertop. He wears glasses and holds a pair of metal kitchen tongs near his mouth, mimicking a microphone. A small white chess piece sits on the counter in front of him.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is in a kitchen, speaking into kitchen tongs. A 2D animated character, Character B, is overlaid on the left side of the screen, appearing to speak. Subtitles are displayed at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Is this your strategy or a cry for help?
Character A says: He loves to humble me as he teaches. But yeah, it's 100% free.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Is this your strategy or a cry for help?
He loves to humble me as he teaches.
But yeah, it's 100% free.

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime, white couch, bookshelf.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits comfortably on a white sectional couch in a bright living room. He wears glasses and holds a blue, translucent chess piece in his hand, gesturing with it towards the camera.

scenes.visual_description: Character A sits on the couch, holding a blue chess piece and speaking to the camera. Subtitles appear on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Your move. Learn chess on Duolingo today for free.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Your move.
Learn chess on Duolingo today for free.
